name: tdd-guardian
description: Enforces strict test-driven development in Codex with workflow skills, code-change gates, coverage checks, and mutation testing.

interface.shortDescription: Strict TDD workflow and gate enforcement for Codex
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native port of TDD Guardian. It bundles workflow skills for plan-first implementation, behavior-driven test design, coverage and mutation gates, review checks, plus installable repo hooks that run quality gates after source changes and block release commands when gates are stale.
defaultPrompt: Use TDD Guardian to implement this with strict TDD.
Initialize TDD Guardian hooks for this repository.
Audit this change for coverage, mutation, and test quality.
